rulings.Case Title: ROBERT A RATTI ET AL VS. RONALD J RATTI SR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For An Order Appointing A Partition Referee Pursuant To Ccp Sect. 872.010, Et. Seq.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF ROBERT RATTI, JOAN RATTI Motion For An Order Appointing A Partition Referee Pursuant To Ccp Sect. 872.010, Et. Seq. Hearing Required. By no later than 9:00 a.m. on November 13, 2019 parties to submit supplemental briefs limited to the following: (1) is there a valid unexpired offer to purchase the property?; (2) if yes, what is the offer amount?; (3) is there a valid unexpired counter-offer? (4) if yes, what is the amount and what is the deadline to respond? (4) each party to provide two names of proposed partition referees. Plaintiff and Defendant to be present. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GUINNANE CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. VS. ISOLDA ANILOVICH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2019 line 9. DEFENDANT ISOLDA ANILOVICH MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that compliance with 24 CFR 880.607(c)(1) must be alleged in the Complaint, while complaint and attachment thereto are the only purported evidence of failure to comply; or any evidence that Plaintiff failed to comply with CRF (e.g. Defendant's declaration) assuming that CFR is applicable; further no authority is cited for the proposition that "opportunity to respond" means "opportunity to cure." = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GUINNANE CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. VS. ISOLDA ANILOVICH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 13, 2019 line 9. PLAINTIFF GUINNANE CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/CFH)
